title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 0–4, this part focuses on Killer, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2 as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cover page request: "Little Birds taking a dust bath in crocodile's sand." Pen Name:Purple-panda

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: Kamazou has been dealt a powerful blow....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Such strength...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Glare!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn.... I got injured before the final battle....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Turn...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dizzy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sir Samuel!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuri- In a certain abandoned village: Kin'Emon and the Mink Tribe's musketeer squad

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, Inuarashi! Where have you been!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What's Wrong, Kin'Emon?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We have a big problem!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They found out about the mark of the crescent moon and the coded message!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything is falling apart!! What should we do, Duke!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We distributed it carefully, so how in the world did they find out about it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We made it into a coded message...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to counter the possibility of it falling into the wrong hands...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and yet... the connection between the two was discovered!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And now, in the capital...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 21 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
